name: A small language model detects behavioural faithfulness gaps that frontier judges and human raters miss
summary: arXiv:2607.09306v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Whether a language model behaves as it claims is a judgement on which independent human raters cannot agree (Fleiss kappa = 0.074). We show...
description: arXiv:2607.09306v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Whether a language model behaves as it claims is a judgement on which independent human raters cannot agree (Fleiss kappa = 0.074). We show that a small, purpose-built instrument does better. A linear read-out of the frozen representation of a from-scratch 146-million-parameter auditor detects companion-induced sycophancy, dependence-fos...
author: Kwan Soo Shin, In Seok Kang, Yunkyung Min, Munho Lee
